page_metadata.biotools__summary: WISH-R package (WISH-R) can calculate epistatic interactions using a linear or generalized linear model on a genome-wide level using genomic data and phenotype/disease data in a fully parallelized environment, and visualize genome-wide epistasis in many ways.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: WISH-R package (WISH-R) can calculate epistatic interactions using a linear or generalized linear model on a genome-wide level using genomic data and phenotype/disease data in a fully parallelized environment, and visualize genome-wide epistasis in many ways.
